steps.name: Add output_format to state schema and initial state builder
steps.description: Extend proposal-state-schema.json with output_format enum (latex, docx). Update ProposalCreationService to include output_format with default docx in initial state.
criteria: New proposals include output_format defaulting to 'docx'
Existing proposals without output_format remain valid

steps.name: FormatConfigService for mid-proposal format changes
steps.description: New domain service validates format value, determines rework risk by wave number, updates state via existing StateWriter port.
criteria: Valid format values accepted and persisted
Invalid or empty format values rejected with error listing valid options
Changes at Wave 3+ return rework warning with wave context
Changes before Wave 3 proceed without warning
Same-format change is a no-op without warning

steps.name: Orchestrator format prompt and status display
steps.description: Add format selection prompt to /proposal new flow after fit scoring, before Go/No-Go. Display output_format in /proposal status dashboard. Surface LaTeX recommendation when solicitation hints at PDF submission.
criteria: Format prompt appears after fit scoring, before Go/No-Go
Explicit selection sets chosen format in state
Status dashboard shows chosen output format

steps.name: Config format command and routing
steps.description: New /proposal config format command. Orchestrator routes to FormatConfigService. Rework warning at Wave 3+ requires user confirmation before state update.
criteria: Rework warning displayed at Wave 3+ with confirmation required
Invalid format value rejected with helpful error
